_metadata.source: Microsoft Learn — Azure Consumption REST API documentation

reservation_summaries_list.description: Lists the reservations summaries for the defined scope daily or monthly grain.
reservation_summaries_list.warning: ARM has a payload size limit of 12MB, so currently callers get 400 when the response size exceeds the ARM limit. In such cases, API call should be made with smaller date ranges.

resourceScope.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

api-version.description: The API version to use for this operation.

$filter.description: Required only for daily grain. The properties/UsageDate for start date and end date. The filter supports 'le' and 'ge'. Not applicable when querying with billing profile.

endDate.description: End date. Only applicable when querying with billing profile.

reservationId.description: Reservation Id GUID. Only valid if reservationOrderId is also provided. Filter to a specific reservation.

security._note: No explicit RBAC action listed in OpenAPI spec. ARM enforces Microsoft.Consumption/reservationSummaries/read at the billing account scope.

reservation_summaries_list._note_ea_vs_non_ea: If you're an EA customer, you can programmatically view how the reservations in your organization are being used via this endpoint. For other subscriptions, use the API Reservations Summaries - List By Reservation Order And Reservation.

reservation_summaries_list_by_reservatio.operation: Reservations Summaries - List By Reservation Order
reservation_summaries_list_by_reservatio.description: Lists the reservations summaries for daily or monthly grain.
reservation_summaries_list_by_reservatio.required_permission: Reservations Reader (582fc458) or higher at the reservation order scope

reservation_summaries_list_by_reservatio.operation: Reservations Summaries - List By Reservation Order And Reservation
reservation_summaries_list_by_reservatio.description: Lists the reservations summaries for daily or monthly grain for a specific reservation within a reservation order.
reservation_summaries_list_by_reservatio.required_permission: Reservations Reader (582fc458) or higher at the reservation scope

list_endpoint_via_lighthouse.reason: Billing account scope (/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/...) is not within Lighthouse's subscription delegation scope

list_by_reservation_order_via_lighthouse.reason: Requires Reservations Reader role which has assignableScopes: ['/providers/Microsoft.Capacity'] — not delegatable via Lighthouse

cost_management_reader_via_lighthouse.reason: Cost Management Reader CAN be delegated via Lighthouse at subscription scope. The Microsoft.Consumption/*/read permission it grants works for subscription-level consumption. However the reservation summaries endpoint requires billing account scope, which Lighthouse cannot grant access to.
cost_management_reader_via_lighthouse.practical_result: Lighthouse-delegated Cost Management Reader cannot access billing-account-scoped reservation summaries
